currentPhase.label: Portal Pilot Prep
currentPhase.summary: Phase 5 pilot prep is active: the public site, capture layer, media preview player, private access shell, and operator reporting are live. Full public release is still blocked by Privacy and Terms approval.

activeWorkstreams.label: Capture, Legal, Seed, Boundary Closeout
activeWorkstreams.summary: Capture, media, reporting, domain, inbox, and boundary work are ready. Privacy and Terms review remain open before full public release.

activeWorkstreams.label: Private Portal Shell
activeWorkstreams.summary: Portal and sign-in routes are private-access shells with screened request paths and no account entitlement promises.

activeWorkstreams.label: Role/Tier Matrix and Screened Intake Routing
activeWorkstreams.summary: Public role paths, inquiry keys, routing queues, and private handoff payloads are defined and QA-covered before any external workflow target is selected.

activeWorkstreams.label: Public Media MVP Workstream
activeWorkstreams.summary: Listen, Watch, and Radio preview sources are live, with playback lifecycle and retention reporting available to approved operators.

deferredBoundaries.label: Internal Systems Bridge
deferredBoundaries.rule: Keep internal app logic outside the public repo until the bridge contract is approved server-side.

deferredBoundaries.label: Paid Membership and Commerce
deferredBoundaries.rule: Keep store and membership waitlist-only until purchase, refund, and membership terms are approved.

nextDecisions.label: External Workflow Target
nextDecisions.summary: Choose Google Workspace, an approved external CRM, an operator build-packet bridge, or an approved private workflow only after the receiver owner and workflow are approved.

nextDecisions.label: Privacy and Terms Approval
nextDecisions.summary: Approve legal review only after the pages match actual site practices.
